• Interactive Magic 8 Ball with 3D WebGL particle effects and shake animations.
  • Supports 5 selectable response styles and AI-generated answers via OpenRouter.
  • Auto-reverts to default 8 display after 45 seconds, uses API key rotation.
    magicBall.classList.add('is-shaking');
    displayInsideBall(replyText);

This interactive Magic 8 Ball web app features a 3D particle background and shake animations when processing queries. Users can select from five response styles, input questions, and receive AI-generated answers via the OpenRouter API. The display automatically reverts to the default 8 icon after 45 seconds, with API key rotation to handle rate limits.
